name: Linocut Printmaking Workshop
description: A linocut printmaking workshop exploring how an image slowly takes shape through carving, surface and pressure

description: Vijayalakshmi Silks marks 105 years with an exhibition tracing silk as cultural history across generations in South India, featuring the 105 Royal Edit, a contemporary collection drawn from the Mysore Royal Family's heirloom archive

name: Friday Work Deli: Focus, Create, Nourish
description: A Friday co-working session for creatives and freelancers, with a sunlit studio, deli-style food and good company

name: The Pide Table : A Turkish Pide Making Experience
description: A hands-on pide workshop, stretching, shaping and filling Turkish flatbreads with spinach and goat cheese, roasted vegetables and lamb and feta, and eating them warm from the oven

description: Three songwriters, one stage, no production. An intimate unplugged evening with Tabitha Kagoo, Nikhil K and Sanjai Shine performing originals shaped by time, memory and lived experience

name: Pop Up Paper Party!
description: Flat paper becomes a furnished room. A pop-up design workshop where you cut, fold and build miniature 3D spaces from scratch

name: World Jazz Festival - Bengaluru
description: Four international acts bring Blue Note jazz, Hammond swing, bossa nova and African tribute music to Bengaluru for the 6th World Jazz Festival

description: Fallen Letters launch their new album Mindfractures at Prog Encounters, alongside Bangalore's Space Remedy and Chennai's Perception Delta

description: Chef Addie takes over The Conservatory for a seven-course menu built around live fire, precise heat and slow fermentation

name: Freestyle Dance Workshop with Srilakshmi
description: Dancer Srilakshmi leads a freestyle session exploring the techniques, foundations and creative processes behind her movement style

name: Theatre Play: Aakhri Sherbat
description: A dark comedy about a man introducing his fiancee to a family whose cheerful logic around murder keeps getting harder to argue with

name: AltSpaces: Alboe Showcase + Shivhari
description: Alboe brings his Hindustani classical-meets-electronic sound back to AltSpaces, joined by Carnatic-trained curator Shivhari at The Burrow

name: Ladakh on a Plate: Decked Out at Lapis
description: Chef Jigmet Mingur, a monk-turned chef, presents a Trans-Himalayan dinner of slow-cooked broths, grains, and seasonal produce across courses

description: UK-rooted selector Emerald brings a rhythm-first set spanning techno, electro, house, acid and ghetto tech to Middle Room

name: Lakkshya at Windmills Craftworks
description: Contemporary Indian fusion ensemble Lakkshya blends Carnatic depth with modern influences through violin, percussion and improvisation at Windmills

name: URBAN HEAT LAB by Unmapped.blr
description: A half-day workshop using games, mapping and world-building to decode urban heat stress as both a systemic issue and a lived experience in Indian cities
